data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of issuing a certificate upon completion with 80% attendance. However, the evidence provided does not confirm that the system generates certificates based on attendance records. While the linked use case mentions that Sarah completed the course with 80% attendance, there is no concrete evidence of an API or process that issues certificates, which constitutes a gap in the requirement validation.
gaps: No evidence of certificate issuance based on attendance.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract for certificate issuance
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that verify the issuance of certificates based on attendance.
